commands.name: chart
commands.description:
Create and manage Excel charts (Regular and 
PivotCharts).

commands.name: conditionalformat
commands.description: Add or clear conditional formatting rules on ranges.

commands.name: connection
commands.description:
Inspect, refresh, and update workbook data connections 
(OLEDB/ODBC/Text/Web).

commands.name: create-empty
commands.description:
Create a new empty workbook on disk (use --overwrite to 
replace existing files).

commands.name: datamodel
commands.description:
Create DAX measures/relationships and inspect the Power 
Pivot Data Model.

commands.name: namedrange
commands.description:
Create, update, delete, and list named 
ranges/parameters.

commands.name: pivottable
commands.description:
Create and configure PivotTables, fields, and refresh 
behavior.

commands.name: powerquery
commands.description:
Manage Power Query M code: list, import/export, update, 
and refresh queries.

commands.name: range
commands.description:
Work with worksheet ranges for values, formulas, 
formatting, validation, and hyperlinks.

commands.name: session
commands.description:
Open, save, close, and list Excel sessions to reuse a 
single Excel process.

commands.name: sheet
commands.description:
Manage worksheet lifecycle, tab colors, and visibility 
within a session.

commands.name: table
commands.description:
Automate Excel Tables: create, resize, filter, sort, and 
manage totals.

commands.name: vba
commands.description:
List, export/import, update, and run VBA modules or 
macros.
